# Papervale Trees — AI-Readable Product Catalogue
# Northern Ireland's first UKISG Certified tree nursery
# 48 Old Newry Road, Rathfriland, Co. Down, BT34 5BQ
# Tel: 028 3085 0059 | Email: info@papervaletrees.com
# Delivering throughout the UK & Ireland | 2-3 Day Tracked Delivery
# EU Plant Passport: UK/NI 8943 | VAT Reg No. 326849373
# Last updated: June 2026

## About
Papervale Trees is Northern Ireland's first UKISG Certified tree nursery, supplying over 300 varieties
of home-grown, fully traceable trees to home gardeners, landscape architects, and commercial contractors
across the UK and Ireland. Container-grown stock available all year round. Bareroot/rootball November–March.

## Shop
URL: https://www.papervaletrees.com/shop.html
Availability list: https://www.papervaletrees.com/availability.html

## Product Catalogue (758 lines, 430 species pages)
Format: Code | Latin Name | Common Name | Pot Size | Height | Price (inc. VAT) | Stock

## Services
- Delivery: 2-3 day tracked courier throughout UK & Ireland
- Hand-packed with planting guide included
- Local planting service available (Co. Down area)
- Site evaluation service
- Trade pricing for landscape professionals and contractors

Opening hours: Mon-Fri by appointment, Sat 10am-2pm
